creator: admin@support.od.ua
text:
# uname -a
FreeBSD core.domain.com 12.0-STABLE FreeBSD 12.0-STABLE r346874 SUPPORT-12-0-1  amd64

There are several (boot) ZFS pools in the system. 

Attempting to choose a non-default first ZFS pool led to this result.

https://webm.red/iyPG

Similar behavior on FreeBSD 12.0-RC3
